name: PayPal Donation Form
description: Accept donations through PayPal with this free form template. Collect donor details and process one-time or recurring contributions.

24.label: This form template is compatible with PayPal payments
24.description: PayPal payments are available to all WPForms users, regardless of license level. If you're new to using PayPal with WPForms, see our documentation for more details on how to set up this integration.
24.expanded-description: The PayPal integration for WPForms lets you accept PayPal payments and credit card payments directly in your forms. You can set up one-time payments or sell recurring subscriptions. For Lite/Basic/Plus users: A 3% platform fee applies to one-time payments. You can accept payments using PayPal Checkout, credit cards, and payment methods like Apple Pay and Google Pay. In order to use PayPal with WPForms, you'll need to connect your site to PayPal in your WPForms Payments settings.

25.label: Configuring the PayPal Commerce Field
25.description:
Click on the PayPal Commerce field to open its options panel. You can then:
[] Select which payment methods you want to allow on your form (PayPal checkout or credit card).
[] Choose the payment method you'd like to display as the default.
[] Enable or disable different credit or debit cards, if you're accepting card payments.
25.expanded-description: In addition to configuring the PayPal Commerce field, you'll need to set up your PayPal Commerce settings in the Payments section of the form builder. Follow this checklist to ensure your payment form is properly configured: [] Enable one-time or recurring payments. Remember, recurring payments can only be taken with PayPal Checkout. [] Map the fields on your form to the corresponding PayPal fields. [] Decide if you want the payments to recur. [] If you wish, enable conditional logic to process some payments one time and others as recurring subscriptions (Pro feature). For Lite/Basic/Plus users: Please note that a 3% platform fee applies to one-time payments. To remove this additional fee and enable conditional logic, you’ll need to upgrade to WPForms Pro license or higher and install the PayPal Commerce Addon If you need help getting started, don't hesitate to see our documentation or get in touch with our support team.

settings.save_resume_disclaimer_message: Heads up! Saving your progress now will store a copy of your entry on this server and the site owner may have access to it. For security reasons, sensitive information such as credit cards and mailing addresses, along with file uploads will have to be re-entered when you resume.
settings.save_resume_confirmation_message:
Your form entry has been saved and a unique link has been created which you can access to resume this form.

Enter your email address to receive the link via email. Alternatively, you can copy and save the link below.

Please note, this link should not be shared and will expire in 30 days, afterwards your form entry will be deleted.
settings.save_resume_email_settings_message:
A link to resume this form has been sent to the email address provided.

Please remember, the link should not be shared and will expire in 30 days.
